qa_pairs.question: What kind of information can be found under the 'Usage by resource allocation project' tab in the CCDB portal?
qa_pairs.answer: Under the 'Usage by resource allocation project' tab, users can find Resource Allocation Project Identifiers (RAPIs) for the selected allocation year. It also displays tables with detailed information on each allocation project and the resources they have used across all clusters. Additionally, the top of the page summarizes details like the account name (e.g., def-, rrg- or rpp-*), the project title and ownership, and overall allocation and usage summaries.
